title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Vedanta - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Vedanta - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Vedanta is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Vedanta:
Vedanta is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vedanta!
